face.structure: oval with softly pronounced cheekbones and a narrow chin

eyes.shape: sharp almond shape with a slight upward slant
eyes.color: deep brown with flecks of gold
details: faint gold rim around the irises
subtle highlights at the top edge

face.expression: contemplative with a slight furrow of the brow

skin.texture: smooth with a hint of natural sheen
skin.rendering_notes: soft diffused light highlights cheekbones and nose bridge

hair.color: deep black with a subtle blue sheen
hair.style: waist-length straight hair with side-swept bangs
hair.flow: flows smoothly with slight movement at the tips
details: wears a simple silver hairpin on the left side

character.aura: intellectual intensity with a calm, composed demeanor

outfit.design: minimalist design with subtle geometric patterns on the sleeves
outfit.fit: tailored to fit snugly, allowing ease of movement

composition.framing: medium close-up focusing on the upper body and face
composition.pose: slightly turned head as if listening intently
composition.gesture: fingertips touching the chin in thoughtful contemplation

background.color_palette: cool tones of soft grey and muted blues
background.details: abstract shapes suggesting motion and thought process
background.rules: background should enhance the character's aura, not distract from it
